basic_details.job_title: IIMA Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA) Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIMA. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIMA Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in economics, urban planning, or business administration with significant coursework in econometrics and/or data analytics. Expertise in Stata/R required.
qualification.details: Master's degree in economics (MSc/MA or similar), or urban planning (MCP/Master of Planning or similar), or business administration (MBA or similar) with significant coursework/concentration in econometrics and/or data analytics. Courses in urban economics, urban development, land use planning, transportation planning/policy or related subjects. Good grades in undergraduate and postgraduate courses in statistics, econometrics, and microeconomics. Expertise in Stata/R required. Expertise in GIS is a plus. Excellent communication skills (both written and oral).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIMA Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIMA to complete the application.
